## What are you deploying?

Example: Spring Boot + Vue on Ubuntu 24.04.

## Command

```bash
bash bin/vps-deploy-doctor.sh --url http://example.com --service demo-api --port 8080
```

## Output

Paste redacted output only. Remove IPs, tokens, cookies, and private domains.

## What did you expect?

Describe the expected result.
